synthesis.content: The Ministry of Energy and Mineral Resources of Indonesia has a Directorate General of Electricity. The state revenue from the energy and mineral resources sector in Indonesia was 249 trillion as of 2025. The electrification ratio in Indonesia was 99.83% as of 06 Apr 2026. The Indonesian Crude Price was 68.79 USD/Barrel as of 06 Apr 2026.
